quote:
The brightest fireworks reveal their true colors long before the last spark fades.  

A vehicle that rushes toward the crowd forgets that it shares the road with breath and laughter.  

When the world is shrouded in haze, it is stillness that reveals the true essence of the storm.  

The finest gowns are not the ones that glitter the most, but the ones that let the heart dance freely.  

A sinking ship teaches that even the strongest currents can be conquered by a mind calm as water.  

The blaze that fuels ambition can scorch the very path it lights if it is not tended with wisdom.  

Even a mountain trembling with heat keeps its peaks forever untouched by the careless wind.
quote_preview: The brightest fireworks reveal their true colors long before the last spark fades.
